Abbreviations : DEN4CYD = dengue vaccine; DT = diphtheria and tetanus toxoids; DTaP = diphtheria and tetanus toxoids and acellular pertussis; HepA = hepatitis A; HepB = hepatitis B; Hib = Haemophilus influenzae type b; HPV = human papillomavirus; IIV = inactivated influenza vaccine; IM = intramuscular; IPV = inactivated poliovir
